segments.text: I know Twig, but I'm not sure if he's ever won with him - I know Twig has played him a ton though
segments.original_text: Sé que Twig, pero no sé si ganó alguna vez con él, sé que Twig lo ha jugado un montón

full_text: I know Twig, but I'm not sure if he's ever won with him - I know Twig has played him a ton though Well, okay, but now... Ken - Ken won with Sephiroth
